author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 1 COMPLETE. All 13 subissues closed. 203 tests passing (176 unit + 26 integration + 1 doctest), 0 failures. Crate structure: 7 modules (tensor, storage, device, dtype, error, shape, creation), autograd engine (graph, no_grad, checkpoint), ops bridges (elementwise, linalg), 7 grad_fn modules (arithmetic, reduction, linalg, activation, shape, indexing, comparison). ~30 differentiable operations implemented with verified VJPs. AC-1 through AC-12 all satisfied.
